changePasswordLede: For your security we re-verify your current password before setting a new one.
passwordRule: Minimum 8 characters with upper, lower, a digit, and a special character.
passwordMinChars: Password must be at least 8 characters.
passwordMaxChars: Password must be at most 128 characters.
passwordNeedsUpper: Add at least one uppercase letter.
passwordNeedsLower: Add at least one lowercase letter.
passwordNeedsSpecial: Add at least one special character.
passwordSameAsCurrent: New password must be different from your current password.
passwordsMustMatch: New password and confirmation must match.
genericRetry: Please try again in a moment.
displayNameNote: This name appears on your profile and in KIAAN greetings.
emailChangeNote: Email changes are not yet supported. Contact support to update it.
nameRequiredMessage: Your sacred name cannot be empty.
profileUpdatedMessage: Your sacred identity has been updated. 🙏
signOutConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to sign out of Kiaanverse?
voicePersonaDesc: Pick the most natural voice on your device · preview before selecting
voiceSettingsA11y: Voice settings — pick voice and persona
clearCacheAlertBody: This will remove all locally cached data. Continue?
signOutAlertBody: Are you sure you want to sign out?
deleteAccountAlertBody: This action is irreversible. All your data, journeys, and reflections will be permanently deleted. Are you absolutely sure?
privacyDeletionBannerFmt: Your account will be permanently deleted on {{date}}.
privacyExportDesc: Art. 20 — Right to data portability. Includes your conversations, practice data, and account info as a ZIP archive.
privacyDeleteDesc: Art. 17 — Right to erasure. All your data will be permanently deleted after a 30-day grace period.
privacyExportRateLimited: You can request one export per 24 hours.
privacyExportFailed: Failed to queue export. Please try again.
privacyDeleteAlertBody:
Your account will be scheduled for permanent deletion in 30 days. During this time you can cancel at any time.

• All data permanently erased
• Stripe subscription cancelled
• Encrypted journal entries deleted
• Cannot be undone after 30 days
privacyDeletionFailed: Failed to schedule deletion. Please try again.
privacyCancelDelBody: Your account will be fully restored. Are you sure?
privacyCancelDelFailed: Failed to cancel deletion. Please try again.
voiceIntroBody: Choose the voice that feels most divine and calm to you. Studio and Neural2 voices sound the most natural; older voices may sound robotic. Tap Play to hear each one before deciding.
voiceCloudDesc: Cloud voices use the device's network to fetch studio-grade audio from ElevenLabs, Sarvam Bulbul, or Bhashini. First play of a phrase takes a moment; replays are instant from cache.
voiceAutoDesc: Picks the most natural voice your device offers.
voiceNoVoicesFound: No voices found for this language. Install a TTS engine update from your device settings to unlock more voices.
voicePersonaStorytellerDesc: Slow, deeper, theatrical. Best for verses.
